text:
YAMANAIAME is the soundtrack album containing original music for the compilation movie Attack on Titan Part 1: Guren no Yumiya, composed by .

Track Listing

YAMANAIAME | Lyrics: Benjamin & mpi | Vocal: Mica Caldito, mpi, Mika Kobayashi
So ist es Immer | Lyrics: Rie, Benjamin & mpi | Vocal: Benjamin
The Reluctant Heroes | Lyrics: mpi | Vocal: Mica Caldito
YAMANAIAME | Lyrics: Benjamin & mpi | Vocal: Mica Caldito, mpi, Mika Kobayashi
YAMANAIAME (Instrumental)
So ist es immer (Instrumental)
The Reluctant Heroes (Instrumental)

Liner Notes

Produced by 
Co-Produced, directed by YASUSHI HORIGUCHI (Legendoor)
Recording, Mixing Engineer & Protools Operator: Mitsunori Aizawa (SIGN SOUND)
Mastering Engineer: YUJI CHINONE (Sony Music Studios Tokyo)
Assistant Engineer: SHO SUZUKI (Studio Sound Valley), MASAYUKI TSURUTA (Bunkamura Studio)
Recorded at Studio Sound Valley, Bunkamura Studios
Mixed at Studio Sound Valley
Mastered at Sony Music Studios
